name: Swim: Pre-Race Mobility
description:
Total: 1600m
- 400m Warm-up (Mix)
- 4x50m Drills (25m Abschlagschwimmen / 25m Kraul)
- 3x200m Z2 (ruhiger 2er-Beinschlag, Pause: 30s)
- 4x25m Aktivierung (70.3 Race Pace)
- 200m Cool-down

name: Run: Venloop Shake-out
description:
Total: 25m
- 15m Z1 Warm-up
- 3x 100m Steigerungen (bis 10k Wettkampftempo, Pause: 100m Gehpause)
- 5m Cool-down
- Fokus: Waden-Mobilität & Gluteus-Aktivierung
